detectors.description:
COSTokenBase.transferOfPower(address)._to (COSToken.sol#551) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = _to (COSToken.sol#559)

Freezeable.unfreeze(address) (COSToken.sol#181-195) compares to a boolean constant:
	-require(bool)(true == _freezeList[addr]) (COSToken.sol#183)

COSStop.stoppable() (COSToken.sol#119-125) compares to a boolean constant:
	-require(bool)(stopped == false) (COSToken.sol#121)

detectors.description:

	-require(bool)(true != _freezeList[addr]) (COSToken.sol#201)

detectors.description: solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.
detectors.markdown: solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.18 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.18 (COSToken.sol#1)
